    E

    earnStudyBonus() - Method in class Character.Nerd
    Counting study if work in Chula and is equal 5 this Nerd get bonus Education and reset WorkCount to 0
    earnWorkBonus() - Method in class Character.GymBro
    Counting work if work in Gym and is equal 5 this Gymbro get bonus money and reset WorkCount to 0
    earnWorkBonus() - Method in class Character.Otaku
    Counting work if work in Mall and is equal 5 this Otaku get bonus money and reset WorkCount to 0
    EDUCATION - Enum constant in enum class Item.Category
    EDUCATION CLASS
    EducationThing - Class in Item
    this Class initialize EducationThing like Book
    EducationThing(String, String) - Constructor for class Item.EducationThing
    constructor that initialize EductionThing
    EducationThingTest - Class in Item
    Test Class for checking EducationThing
    EducationThingTest() - Constructor for class Item.EducationThingTest
     
    endGame() - Method in class Screen.UI.ScreenManager
    Closes the game window and ends the application.
    execute(GamePaneImage) - Method in interface Screen.BuildingScreen.ShopItem
    Runs the item action
